title: SKILL.md Frontmatter Schema
description: JSON Schema for Agent Skills SKILL.md YAML frontmatter per agentskills.io specification

name.description: Skill name. 1-64 chars, lowercase alphanumeric and hyphens only. Must not start/end with hyphen, no consecutive hyphens. Must match parent directory name.

description.description: One-line description of what the skill does and when to use it. Max 1024 characters.

license.description: License name or reference to a bundled license file.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value mapping for additional metadata.
